attributes.description: Alerts when `task_scheduler_total_execute_failure` increases. Scheduled tasks (downsamples, continuous queries) are failing.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] Task execution failures

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB task execution failures

### What fired
Counter `task_scheduler_total_execute_failure` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Failed tasks mean downsampling, rollups, or alerting flows did not run. Depending on the task, this may cause stale downsamples or missed alerts.

### Triage
1. Identify failing tasks via the Tasks API.
2. Inspect task error logs.

### Remediation
- Fix the task script or its dependencies.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.
